content:
Imagine, I was like, oh, so what if every day it told the new comic panel or a story or whatever scene you want to do it in a narrative?

And at the end, you could decide, like, oh, I'm going to collect it and we'll print it as a hardcover book.

You know, you could figure out ways to memorialize it and all that stuff.

It's like, ah, all of the, the whole business is in this, in it already.

Well, but see, yeah, you break it down even more.

You just have your app or your personal page, right?

It doesn't even have to be an app yet.

You said your personal page too.

Like my best friend, she has two doodles.

She'd be all the fuck about it, right?

So I send it to her and so every day she can get on and see what they're up to, and then she can see her little quote of the day in the calendar or else, right, then she can go in and out her favorites then turn it into a calendar for next year or or she can just subscribe for one month and see what she likes and then be like, oh, yeah, I need this in hard copy and all of my friends do want to.
